spec.name: The Top Of The Tower
spec.description: You have arrived at the top of the tower. This tower is pretty uninteresting, and seems made purely for reasons of defence and guarding. The windows are slits for bowmen, very narrow on the outward side and broad inwards to allow a wide shooting angle. The only evident exit is down the stairs again.

down.description: The stairs go down to the second floor.

extra_descs.description: As you look out the windows, you are granted a view of the countryside.
